items.title: Book Notes Collection
items.shortDescription: My personal notes and key takeaways from impactful books across business, psychology, and philosophy.
items.description: A future free resource that packages durable book notes for faster review and application.
items.summary: My personal notes and key takeaways from impactful books across business, psychology, and philosophy.

items.title: Weekly Review Template
items.shortDescription: The template I use every Sunday to reflect on the week and plan ahead with intention.
items.description: A free weekly review template for reflection, planning, and intentional next actions.
items.summary: The template I use every Sunday to reflect on the week and plan ahead with intention.

items.title: Personal Finance Tracker
items.shortDescription: A simple spreadsheet for tracking income, expenses, savings rate, and net worth over time.
items.description: A free personal finance spreadsheet for income, expenses, savings rate, and net worth tracking.
items.summary: A simple spreadsheet for tracking income, expenses, savings rate, and net worth over time.

items.title: Decision Making Framework
items.shortDescription: A checklist of questions and frameworks I use when facing important decisions.
items.description: A free decision-making checklist for assumptions, constraints, options, and next actions.
items.summary: A checklist of questions and frameworks I use when facing important decisions.

items.title: Reading Operating System
items.shortDescription: A future downloadable template for turning books into durable notes, decisions, and action.
items.description: A lightweight resource placeholder for the future commerce/resource layer. It keeps the catalog shape ready without changing the current public product experience.
items.summary: A future downloadable template for turning books into durable notes, decisions, and action.

items.title: First Principles Decision Template
items.shortDescription: A future worksheet for breaking decisions down to assumptions, truths, options, and next actions.
items.description: A commerce-ready placeholder connected to the skills library. The generated API exposes it to agents before a checkout provider is chosen.
items.summary: A future worksheet for breaking decisions down to assumptions, truths, options, and next actions.
